basic_details.job_title: PGIMER Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Consultant Paediatrics and Internal Medicine Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER)

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years. Age Relaxation: SC/ST - 5 years, OBC - 3 years, candidates already in Government schemes - 5 years.

qualification.education_qualification: MD Paediatrics/Medicine from recognized medical college
qualification.details: Consultant Paediatrics: MD Paediatrics from a recognized medical college. Three years of residency experience, One year of Telemedicine experience. Consultant Internal Medicine: MD Medicine from a recognized medical college. Three years of residency experience, One year of Telemedicine experience.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for PGIMER Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 04-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PGIMER Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Consultant Paediatrics and Internal Medicine posts at PGIMER is 04 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MD in Paediatrics or Medicine from a recognized medical college to be eligible for these positions.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for Consultant posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for Consultant Paediatrics and Internal Medicine posts at PGIMER.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 50 years, with relaxations available for SC/ST and OBC categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email to the specified address, along with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary for these Consultant posts ranges from ₹1,20,000 to ₹1,50,000 per month, based on experience.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for PGIMER recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. What experience is required for the Consultant positions?
faq.answer: Applicants need three years of residency experience and one year of Telemedicine experience for both Consultant Paediatrics and Internal Medicine roles.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for PGIMER Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the Important Links section provided, which includes a direct download link.
